summary: Completed comprehensive testing of banner edit functionality. All backend API tests passed (5/5). All frontend UI tests passed. The edit banner feature is fully functional.

backend_api: PUT /api/config/banners/{id} - returns 400 for empty update body
PUT /api/config/banners/{id} - full CRUD flow (create->edit->verify->delete) works correctly
GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} - returns banners array with correct structure
frontend_banners_edit: Edit button (pencil icon) visible alongside Delete button on banner cards
Clicking Edit button populates form with banner data (image, title, link, order, status)
Form title changes from 'Add New Banner' to 'Edit Banner' in edit mode
Cancel button appears in edit mode
Cancel button resets form back to add mode with cleared fields
Banner card gets 'editing' highlight class when selected for edit
Update Banner button replaces Add Banner button in edit mode
PUT /api/config/banners/{id} called successfully when Update Banner clicked
Banner list reflects updated data without page reload
Success toast 'Banner updated' displayed after successful update
frontend_size_hint: Size hint text 'Recommended: 1200 x 675px (16:9 ratio). Max 5MB.' visible below banner image field

seed_data_creation: None required - existing restaurant user and banners used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner edit functionality fully implemented and working. Admin login flow: enter email in phone field -> detects @ -> shows password form -> login -> redirects to /admin/settings. Navigate to Banners tab. Two existing banners: 'Happy Hour - 20% Off' and 'Weekend Special Menu'. Edit flow: click pencil icon -> form populates with banner data + title changes to 'Edit Banner' + Cancel button appears + banner card highlighted -> modify fields -> click 'Update Banner' -> PUT request sent -> banner list updated. All data-testid attributes correctly implemented.

features_verified.Edit button on banner cards: PASS - pencil icon visible and clickable
features_verified.Form populated in edit mode: PASS - image, title, link, order, status all populated
features_verified.Cancel resets form: PASS - clears fields, changes title back to Add New Banner
features_verified.Banner card editing highlight: PASS - .editing class applied to selected card
